title: pelargonium × vespertinum
intro: Pelargonium × vespertinum, also known as Evening Primrose or Cape Marigold, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its showy flowers and delicate foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × vespertinum include relief from inflammation, menstrual cramps, and skin issues, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and capsules, are often used to harness its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness for certain health conditions.
